title: fraxinus excelsior f. horizontalis
intro: Fraxinus excelsior f. horizontalis, also known as the horizontal-branching ash, is a rare and unique variety of the common ash tree (Fraxinus excelsior) characterized by its horizontal branches and slender leaves. The bark and leaves of the Fraxinus excelsior f. horizontalis plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Fraxinus excelsior f. horizontalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
